/home/runner/work/eckit/.codeql-scratch/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++  -pipe -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-sign-compare -O3 -DNDEBUG     -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ECKIT-221.x.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/ECKIT-221.x.dir/ECKIT-221.cc.o" -o ECKIT-221.x  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/eckit/eckit/_codeql_build_dir/lib ../lib/libeckit_mpi.so ../lib/libeckit.so -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -ldl
